name: siemens-plc
documentation:
# siemens_plc
通过snap7操作西门子plc

modules.name: siemens_plc.exception
documentation: PLC exception base class.

classes.name: siemens_plc.exception.PLCBaseException
documentation:
Base exception class for PLC-related errors.

This exception class inherits from FactoryStandBaseException and serves as
the base for all exceptions related to PLC operations.

classes.name: siemens_plc.exception.PLCConnectError
documentation:
Exception raised for PLC Connect errors.

This exception is a subclass of PLCBaseException and is raised when there
is a Connect error during PLC operations.

classes.name: siemens_plc.exception.PLCReadError
documentation:
Exception raised for PLC read errors.

This exception is a subclass of PLCBaseException and is raised when there
is an error related to reading data from the PLC.

classes.name: siemens_plc.exception.PLCWriteError
documentation:
Exception raised for PLC write errors.

This exception is a subclass of PLCBaseException and is raised when there is
an error related to writing data to the PLC.

modules.name: siemens_plc.s7_plc
documentation: PLC drive.

classes.name: siemens_plc.s7_plc.S7PLC

methods.name: siemens_plc.s7_plc.S7PLC.__init__
documentation: Initialize the S7Plc class.

methods.name: siemens_plc.s7_plc.S7PLC.communication_open
documentation:
Connect to a PLC.

Raises:
    PLCConnectError: If there is an error in the connection process.

methods.name: siemens_plc.s7_plc.S7PLC.disconnect
documentation: Disconnect from the PLC.

methods.name: siemens_plc.s7_plc.S7PLC.get_connect_state
documentation:
Get connect to plc state.

Returns:
    bool: True is connected, False is not connected.

methods.name: siemens_plc.s7_plc.S7PLC.execute_read
documentation:
读取plc数据的通用方法.

Args:
    data_type (str): 读取数据的类型.
    db_num (int): db num.
    start (int): 开始地址位.
    size (int): 地址位长度.
    bool_index (int): bool类型对应的bool index, 默认为0.
    save_log: 是否保存日志, 默认保存.

Returns:
    Union[str, bool, int]: 返回读取plc读取的数据.

methods.name: siemens_plc.s7_plc.S7PLC.read_int_data
documentation:
Read integer data from the PLC.

Args:
    db_number (int): Number of the DB to be read.
    start (int): Byte index to start reading from.
    size (int): Amount of bytes to be read.
    save_log: 是否保存日志, 默认保存.

Returns:
    int: Status of the read integer data operation.

Raises:
    PLCReadError: If reading integer type data fails.

methods.name: siemens_plc.s7_plc.S7PLC.read_real_data
documentation:
Read real data from the PLC.

Args:
    db_number (int): Number of the DB to be read.
    start (int): Byte index to start reading from.
    size (int): Amount of bytes to be read.
    save_log: 是否保存日志, 默认保存.

Returns:
    int: Value of the read real data operation.

Raises:
    PLCReadError: If reading real type data fails.

methods.name: siemens_plc.s7_plc.S7PLC.read_lreal_data
documentation:
Read lreal data from the PLC.

Args:
    db_number (int): Number of the DB to be read.
    start (int): Byte index to start reading from.
    size (int): Amount of bytes to be read.
    save_log: 是否保存日志, 默认保存.

Returns:
    int: Value of the read lreal data operation.

Raises:
    PLCReadError: If reading lreal type data fails.

methods.name: siemens_plc.s7_plc.S7PLC.read_bool_data
documentation:
Read bool data from the PLC.

Args:
    db_number (int): Number of the DB to be read.
    start (int): Byte index to start reading from.
    size (int): Amount of bytes to be read.
    bool_index (int): bit index to read from.
    save_log: 是否保存日志, 默认保存.

Returns:
    bool: Status of the read bool data operation.

Raises:
    PLCReadError: If reading bool type data fails.

methods.name: siemens_plc.s7_plc.S7PLC.read_str_data
documentation:
Read string data from the PLC.

Args:
    db_number (int): Number of the DB to be read.
    start (int): Byte index to start reading from.
    size (int): Amount of bytes to be read.
    save_log: 是否保存日志, 默认保存.

Returns:
    int: Status of the read string data operation.

Raises:
    PLCReadError: If reading string type data fails.

methods.name: siemens_plc.s7_plc.S7PLC.execute_write
documentation:
写入plc数据的通用方法.

Args:
    data_type (str): 读取数据的类型.
    db_num (int): db num.
    start (int): 开始地址位.
    data (Union[str, bool, int]): 要写入的数据.
    bool_index (int): bool类型对应的bool index.

Returns:
    int: 写入后的code.

methods.name: siemens_plc.s7_plc.S7PLC.write_int_data
documentation:
Write integer data to the PLC.

Args:
    db_number (int): Number of the DB to be written.
    start (int): Byte index to start writing to.
    data (int): The value to be written.

Returns:
    int: Status of the write integer data operation.

Raises:
    PLCWriteError: If writing integer type data fails.

methods.name: siemens_plc.s7_plc.S7PLC.write_real_data
documentation:
Write real data to the PLC.

Args:
    db_number (int): Number of the DB to be written.
    start (int): Byte index to start writing to.
    data (int): The value to be written.

Returns:
    Optional[int]: Status of the write real data operation.

Raises:
    PLCWriteError: If writing real type data fails.

methods.name: siemens_plc.s7_plc.S7PLC.write_lreal_data
documentation:
Write lreal data to the PLC.

Args:
    db_number (int): Number of the DB to be written.
    start (int): Byte index to start writing to.
    data (int): The value to be written.

Returns:
    Optional[int]: Status of the write lreal data operation.

Raises:
    PLCWriteError: If writing lreal type data fails.

methods.name: siemens_plc.s7_plc.S7PLC.write_bool_data
documentation:
Write bool data to the PLC.

Args:
    db_number (int): Number of the DB to be written.
    start (int): Byte index to start writing to.
    data (bool): The value to be written.
    bool_index (int): bit index to read from, The range is 0-7.

Returns:
    int: Status of the write string data operation.

Raises:
    PLCWriteError: If writing bool type data fails.

methods.name: siemens_plc.s7_plc.S7PLC.write_str_data
documentation:
Write string data to the PLC.

Args:
    db_number (int): Number of the DB to be written.
    start (int): Byte index to start writing to.
    data (str): The value to be written.

Returns:
    int: Status of the write string data operation.

Raises:
    PLCWriteError: If writing string type data fails.
This class provides methods for interacting with a Siemens S7 PLC using the Snap7 library.
pylint: disable=too-many-arguments, too-many-positional-arguments
